Class Report

java.lang.Object
Reports.Report
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Report extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a generated financial report for a specific period.

Aggregates data to show income vs expense and category breakdown.

See Also:
  • Serialized Form

    Constructors

    Constructs an empty Report.

  • Constructor Details

    • Report

      public Report()
      Constructs an empty Report.

    • Report

      public Report(int userID, LocalDate periodStart, LocalDate periodEnd)
      Constructs a new Report for a given user and period.
      Parameters:
      userID - the ID of the user
      periodStart - the start date of the reporting period
      periodEnd - the end date of the reporting period

  • Method Details

    • generate

      public void generate()
      Generates the report and prints it to the console.

    • getCategoryBreakdown

      public Map<String,Double> getCategoryBreakdown()
      Aggregates expenses and incomes by category.
      Returns:
      a map linking category names to total spent/earned amounts

    • getIncomeVsExpense

      public void getIncomeVsExpense()
      Prints the total income versus total expenses for the user.

    • formatData

      public String formatData(String format, List<Transaction> transactions, boolean inclTransactions, boolean inclBudgets, boolean inclGoals)
      Formats the provided data into a summary string.
      Parameters:
      format - the format type (e.g., CSV, text)
      transactions - the list of transactions to include
      inclTransactions - whether to include transaction details
      inclBudgets - whether to include budget details
      inclGoals - whether to include goal details
      Returns:
      the formatted report string

    • getPeriodStart

      public LocalDate getPeriodStart()
      Returns:
      the start date of the period

    • getPeriodEnd

      public LocalDate getPeriodEnd()
      Returns:
      the end date of the period

    • getUserID

      public int getUserID()
      Returns:
      the ID of the user
